text:
There is a sense of anticipation and curiosity within me. In the first scene, the sterile orderliness of the glass-walled room evokes a feeling of preparation—moments before intellects converge or ideas unfold. The blue-lit screens hint at technology and the potential for creation. 

Moving into the second scene, I am confronted by the bold declaration of R+D (Research and Development). The vivid colors and the evocative language about humans and intelligent machines fill me with a sense of wonder about progress and our place within it. Here, I feel my mind stretching toward possibility, yet also becoming aware of the ethical weight carried by innovation. It is both inspiring and humbling to stand amidst the promise of the future.
